data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Ensures secure access to user accounts through multiple authentication methods.
data.technical_spec: Implemented via Microsoft Authenticator and SMS codes.

data.title: Integrated Threat Protection
data.description: Detects and responds to threats with integrated security solutions.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts sensitive data in transit and at rest to protect user information.
data.technical_spec: Employs TLS 1.2+ for data in transit, AES-256 for encryption at rest.

data.title: Firewall and Network Segmentation
data.description: Implements advanced firewall solutions to safeguard network infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Azure Firewall and Network Security Groups (NSGs) in use.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security assessments to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes both automated and manual penetration testing methodologies.
